fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. SessionStoreConfig has peek_transcript_skeleton(session_id) returning a list of SessionTurnSkeletons. 2. SessionTurnSkeleton contains sequence, role, captured_at, tool_name, content_len, and a short content_preview. 3. Full content is not serialized. 4. Focused unit tests cover skeleton generation and preview truncation.
fields.title: [session-api] Transcript skeleton peeking
